skills.name: Illusion Control
skills.description: Use Illusion Magic to summon one of your{#983399}{ol}[Illusion]. You temporarily evade the place to avert the crisis. Use the skill one more time before {#983399}{ol}[Illusion] disappears to switch locations.
skills.effect_text:
Equal to [Magical Illusion] skill's attack factor
Stealth Duration: 5 seconds
Illusion Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Illusion Blade
skills.description: Throw an Illusion Blade that bounces back in a straight line, dealing damage. Targets are slowed for a duration, and allies and the caster who touch the blade take damage reduction for a duration.
skills.effect_text:
1 Strike Skill Factor SkillFactor %
Number of Targets CaptionRatio
Illusion Stack +1
Enemy's Movement Speed -50% for 4 seconds
Damage received -10% for 10 seconds

skills.name: Illusion Blast
skills.description: Instantly blow up the summoned Illusion, dealing AoE damage around the Illusion and stunning the target for 2 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per strike: SkillFactor %
Number of target(s): CaptionRatio

skills.name: Magical Illusion
skills.description: Summon 2 {#983399}{ol}[Illusion] of yourself. Summoned Illusions will seek out and attack nearby enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor on each attack per illusion SkillFactor %
Illusion Duration 10 seconds

skills.name: Deluge
skills.description: Unleashes accumulated illusion magic to fire a powerful beam of illusion in front of you, dealing AoE damage. Allies touched by the beam have 1 removable debuff removed, and enemies have 1 removable buff removed.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per hit: SkillFactor %
Number of target(s): CaptionRatio

skills.name: Nightmare
skills.description: Unleash the Eye of Nightmare, creating a mind-collapsing realm of illusion. Deal damage over time to enemies in the area and inflict up to 5 stacks of [Nightmare: Collapse] debuffs.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor per hit SkillFactor %
Number of Targets CaptionRatio
Duration CaptionRatio2 second(s)

skills.name: Illusion Armor
skills.description: The caster wears a protective illusion armor. If you are hit while the illusionary armor is up, you gain one beneficial effect and the target that attacked you gains one detrimental effect.
skills.effect_text:
Buff/ Debuff Duration 10초
Retrigger Cooldown CaptionRatio seconds

attributes.name: Illusion Blade: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Illusion Blade] by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Illusion Blast: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Illusion Blast] by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Magical Illusion: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Magical Illusion] by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Deluge: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Deluge] by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Nightmare: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Nightmare] by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Illusion Blade: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Illusion Blade] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Illusion Blast: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Illusion Blast] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Magical Illusion: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Magical Illusion] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Deluge: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Deluge] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Nightmare: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Nightmare] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Illusion Blade: Immerse
attributes.description:
* [Illusion Blade] is changed to a casting skill

* 1.5 seconds Casting

* Illusion Blade Damage +20%

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Illusion Blast: Trauma
attributes.description:
* [Illusion Blast] is changed to a casting skill

* Stun effect is deactivated

* Critical Resistance/Evasion -10% Debuff applied to enemy for 10 seconds

* 1 second Casting

attributes.name: Illusion Blast: Channeling
attributes.description:
* [Illusion Blast] is changed to a casting skill

* Stun effect is deactivated

* AoE damage every 1 second at the location of the illusion while channeling

* Up to 5 times within 5 seconds

* Skill Factor -20% per hit

attributes.name: Magical Illusion: Sword
attributes.description:
* Changed to an Illusion Blader that deals melee attack instead of a ranged attack

* Chaged to deal 120% damage of Magical Illusion Skill Factor

* Cast Illusion Blow every 3 seconds, Damage equal to 200% of Magical Illusion Skill Factor and AoE attack

attributes.name: Deluge: Channeling
attributes.description:
* [Deluge] is changed to Channeling

* Damage 2 times per 0.5 seconds, Up to 5 seconds

* Effect per casting charge stage is not applied.

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Deluge: Chase
attributes.description:
* On hit, the target is knocked backward.

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Nightmare: Daydream
attributes.description:
* [Nightmare] is changed to a casting skill

* 1.5 seconds Casting

* Nightmare Damage +25%

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Nightmare: Channeling
attributes.description:
* [Nightmare] is changed to Channeling

* Total number of strikes changed to 20

* Skill Factor increases by 50% of before at maximum strike

* Channeling duration up to 5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Illusion Armor: Solidity
attributes.description:
* Deactivate previous [Illusion Armor] effect

* Obatin a [Solidity] buff that reduces damage taken by 25% up to 7 times when hit

* Buff Cooldown +7 seconds when hit

* [Solidity] is removed when consumed.

attributes.name: Illusion Armor: Transfer
attributes.description:
* Deactivate previous [Illusion Armor] effect

* Obtain a [Illusion Armor: Transfer] buff when hit

* [Illusion Armor: Transfer] Critical Resistance effect for 10 seconds

* [Illusion Armor: Transfer] Immune to Stagger/Knockback/Stun for 10 seconds (Except certain boss skills)

* Buff retrigger cooldown +7 seconds when hit
